skill: One-variable data: Distributions and measures of center and spread
stem:
The table summarizes test scores for two classes.

Class PClass Q
Minimum6258
Maximum8896
Median7575

Which statement is true based on the table?

answerOptions.content: The Class P data set is identical to the Class Q data set.
The median score in Class Q is larger than the median score in Class P.
The scores in Class P had a larger spread than the scores in Class Q.

rationale:
Choice B is correct. The maximum value for Class Q is 96, which is greater than Class P's maximum of 88. So Class Q contained the highest score.

Choice A is unsupported — the same median doesn't mean the data sets are identical. Choice C is wrong because the medians are equal. Choice D is wrong because Class Q's range (96-58 = 38) exceeds Class P's range (88-62 = 26).
